pkgmetadata.longdescription: Javascript.pyThis package lets you use javascript like objects in python. InstallationStable versionpip install javascriptpyWorking versionpip install git+httpsgithub.comCodeWithSwastikjavascript-py Example Usagepythonfrom javascript import array Array(apple, orange, cherry)index Math.floor(Math.random() array.length)console.info(Random element, array[index])console.table(array) Consolepyfrom javascript import console, Arrayconsole.clear()console.error(Syntax Error)console.warn(Forgot an import)console.table(Array([earth, venus]))[image](httpsuser-images.githubusercontent.com61446939126521684-669e4dd5-4263-4c5e-9cce-9c0e097759e3.png) Whats new- Added RegExp, Date, JSON
